message:
test(serve): batch 12 — scanner run/status, audit query filters, idempotency store (71.9%→73.0%)

Key per-function improvements:
- handleRunScan: 25% → 87.5% (bad JSON, success start with/without path)
- handleScannerStatus: → 100% (ubs-available version retrieval path)
- AuditStore.Query: 87.3% → 96.4% (action/resource/session/approval/since/until/offset filters)
- handleAgentWaitV1: 40% → 90% (custom timeout_ms/poll_ms parsing)
- handleRouteV1: 57.7% → 80.8% (valid exclude parsing path)
- ScannerStore GetScans/GetFindings/GetFindingsByScan: → 100%
- NewIdempotencyStore: → 100% (zero/negative TTL defaults)
- IdempotencyStore.Get: expired entry branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
